title: WashU researchers use efficient method to split hydrogen from water for energy
summary_en: WashU researchers have designed a new catalyst to extract hydrogen, a valuable yet low-cost source of zero-emissions fuel.
title_cn: 圣路易斯华盛顿大学研究人员采用高效方法从水中分解氢制取能源

title: Separating fact from fiction in housing affordability and corporate investors
summary_en: The rise of institutional investors in the housing market is a symptom, rather than the cause, of an extremely tight housing market and the overall housing affordability crisis, according to Carol Camp Yeakey, the Marshall S. Snow Professor of Arts & Sciences at WashU.
title_cn: 住房可负担性与企业投资者相关问题真伪辨析

title: Building math minds in pre‑K: Hazelwood and WashU make numbers count
summary_en: Pre-K isn’t just for story time — it’s also when children learn important math concepts. The WashU Institute for School Partnership is partnering with the Hazelwood School District to boost kindergarten readiness through coaching, lesson planning and professional development to meet the needs of pre-K educators.
title_cn: 开展学前班数学思维培养：黑兹尔伍德学区与圣路易斯华盛顿大学推动数学启蒙落地见效
summary_cn: 未接收到对应摘要英文原文，无法开展翻译工作，请补充提供相关内容。
